content: CoverageTrap: Why Greedy Paper Selection Misses Evidence Linking: Coverage-aware selection and topic-specific replanning recover missing evidence better than top-k greedy selection.
Stale Reflection Notes and the Cost of Unchecked Recall: Unchecked stale memory makes reflection look more reliable than the evidence supports.
PlanSketch: Lightweight Decomposition for Small Review Tasks: Lightweight decomposition adds enough structure for small review tasks without heavy formal planning.
MemoryPolicy: When Notes Help and When They Mislead: Memory must include retrieval and forgetting policy, not just storage.
